_note: One config per source. enabled=false mutes a source. Retuned 2026-06-18 to the visual/design-first taste (see CURATION.md), using measured per-source hit-rates under the recalibrated judge: muted the 0%-keep noise (Hacker News, HF daily papers) and retargeted GitHub / Product Hunt / Hugging Face / arXiv to design · UI · 3D · typography · illustration · image, in any form.

filters._note: Cross-cutting gates from CURATION.md. maxAgeDays = hard recency ceiling (~6mo); target is fresher.

reddit._note: Skipped automatically until REDDIT_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are set (API approval pending). Subs refocused on design/skills, away from the raw-model/local-LLM lane the judge rejects.

hackernews._note: MUTED 2026-06-18 — 0% keep-rate under the design-first judge (0/34). HN surfaces dev/infra and novelty, not visual-creative tools. Re-enable only with a much tighter design gate.

github._note: Retargeted to the design/skills keep-lane (Claude/agent skills, MCP servers, design tools), away from raw nodes/models the judge rejects.

arena._note: Human curation IS the signal. Swap these for channels Will actually follows.

hfpapers._note: MUTED 2026-06-18 — 0% keep-rate (0/58). HF daily papers are ML-infra (foundation models, efficiency, surveys) the judge rejects. Creative papers (typography, aesthetics, 3D) now come from the retargeted arXiv source below.

producthunt._note: Best source (18% keep-rate). COMMERCIAL intake — launched products the open feeds can't see. v2 GraphQL API (vote-ranked, topic-filtered) via PRODUCTHUNT_KEY/SECRET; keyless Atom fallback otherwise. Topics + keyword gate focused on design/visual; audio/music/voice stripped.

arxiv._note: Creative-papers lane (replaces HF Papers). Tight design/visual queries in cs.GR (graphics) + cs.HC (HCI) + cs.CV so it surfaces the typography/aesthetics/3D papers Will keeps, not the diffusion-efficiency firehose. Watch its hit-rate on the next run; tighten if it floods.

huggingface._note: Models lane — narrowed to image/3D (the only model pipelines the judge keeps); video pipelines dropped. Two passes (top-liked + newest) so fresh drops aren't lost behind all-time hits.
